chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-6202 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.1 2. For order on Misc. No.26381/2022 (Exemption) 3. For order on Misc. No.26382/2022 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case 26.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is almost three years ago. No one has turned up since inception to pursue this petition. Despite lapse of three years, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. Today, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
